Sales Agent

Lead Research Agent

A Lead Research Agent builds a fresh list of enriched prospects matching your ICP every day — company data, decision-maker contacts, recent news signals — and pushes them directly into your CRM. Your team starts each day with warm, researched leads instead of spending hours on manual research.

FAQ

Common questions about Lead Research Agent.

Where does the lead data come from?
LinkedIn (via your Sales Navigator account), Apollo.io, Crunchbase, company websites, and public databases. All data aggregated and deduplicated.
How many leads does it produce per day?
Configurable. Typical: 20–50 net-new enriched leads/day matching your ICP. You define the criteria: industry, company size, geography, tech stack, signals like recent funding.
What does 'enriched' mean?
Beyond name and email: company size, funding status, recent news, tech stack, decision-maker contact details, LinkedIn links, and intent signals.
Can it monitor existing prospects for trigger events?
Yes. Set triggers: alert when any of your target accounts raises funding, posts a hiring surge, or mentions a keyword in news.
Does it integrate with my existing CRM?
Yes. Leads pushed directly to HubSpot, Zoho CRM, or Salesforce with all enrichment fields mapped. Deduplication against existing contacts runs before every push.

Deploy Lead Research Agent for your team.
